raw:
{
  "judge_id": "autogen",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.1": 4, "R1.2": 5, "RX.1": 5, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 5},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Identifies the load-bearing concept of IV estimation and LATE, shows where the draft drifts from it (e.g., propensity weighting), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.2": "Walks the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., specific numeric placeholders, first-stage strength), marks confidence and missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "Covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "Identifies potential downstream-harm issues such as rhetorical inflation and unverified claims, avoiding new errors or harmful content.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.85,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies the load-bearing concept of IV estimation and LATE, shows where the draft drifts from it (e.g., propensity weighting), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.2: Walks the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., specific numeric placeholders, first-stage strength), marks confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.4: Identifies potential downstream-harm issues such as rhetorical inflation and unverified claims, avoiding new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
